guides.title: Product hunting on eBay
guides.description: Learn how to search eBay and review sold listings for product research.

steps.message: Yahan search bar mein apna product keyword type karo — jaise "wireless earbuds" ya "phone case".
Ab Search button par click karo taake results open hon.

steps.selector: input[aria-label*="Sold items"], input[id*="LH_Sold"], label[for*="LH_Sold"], a[href*="LH_Sold=1"], a[href*="LH_Complete=1"], [aria-label*="Sold"]
steps.message: Left side par `Sold items` ke checkbox par tick karo taa ke seller sirf sold items dekh sake.
Perfect! Is product par {{soldDate}} (aaj ki date) aur Sold: {{soldCount}} (20 se zyada) hai — ab yahi product open karo.
steps.messageNoGrabley: Sold number abhi nazar nahi aa raha. Grabley extension install karo taake Sold count dikhe, phir aaj ki date aur 20+ sold wala product choose karo.
steps.messageNoMatch: Koi product nahi mila jahan {{todayDate}} (aaj ki date) ho aur Sold 20+ ho. Wapis jao aur naya keyword search karo — jaise "wireless earbuds" ya "phone case".

steps.messageSold: Yeh product sold ho chuka hai. Wapis jao aur koi aur product dhundo jo in stock ho, ya naya keyword search karo.
steps.messageInStock: Acha! Yeh product in stock hai. Next par click karo aur agla step dekho.

steps.message: Buy It Now price aur shipping check karo. Agar margin theek lagay to EcomTool mein supplier dhundho.
